_README: Template only — NOT auto-installed. Copy entries you actually need into a project .mcp.json (shared, checked in) or add privately with `claude mcp add`. Keys starting with _ are comments; remove them. See docs/mcp-guide.md for scopes, Tool Search, and the add-a-server checklist.

example-http-server._comment: Remote server over HTTP (recommended transport). OAuth-capable; headers support ${ENV_VAR} expansion so no literal secrets live in a checked-in file.

example-stdio-server._comment: Local process over stdio. ${VAR:-default} expansion works in command/args/env.

example-always-loaded._comment: alwaysLoad exempts this server's tools from Tool Search deferral — use only for tools needed constantly; it spends context every session.
